title: astragalus laccoliticus
intro: Astragalus laccoliticus is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, native to the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus laccoliticus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus laccoliticus is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
